# komodo_deployment (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo deployment resource by ID or name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_deployment" "example" {
  id = "my-app"
}

output "deployment_server_id" {
  value = data.komodo_deployment.example.server_id
}
```

## Argument Reference

- `id` (Required) - The deployment identifier (ObjectId or name).

## Attribute Reference

- `name` - The unique name of the deployment.
- `swarm_id` - The ID of the Docker Swarm.
- `server_id` - The ID of the server.
- `image` - The image source configuration.
  - `type` - Image source type: `"Image"` or `"Build"`.
  - `image` - Docker image reference.
  - `build_id` - ID of the Komodo Build resource.
  - `version` - Build version.
    - `major` - Major version component.
    - `minor` - Minor version component.
    - `patch` - Patch version component.
- `image_registry_account` - Registry account used for pulling the image.
- `skip_secret_interp` - Whether secret interpolation in environment variables is skipped.
- `redeploy_on_build` - Whether automatic redeployment on build completion is enabled.
- `poll_for_updates` - Whether periodic polling for new image versions is enabled.
- `auto_update` - Whether automatic updates to new image versions are enabled.
- `send_alerts` - Whether alerts are sent for this deployment.
- `links` - Quick links associated with this deployment.
- `network` - Docker network mode.
- `restart` - Docker restart policy.
- `command` - Container command override.
- `replicas` - Number of container replicas.
- `termination_signal` - Signal used to stop the container.
- `termination_timeout` - Timeout in seconds before forcefully killing the container.
- `extra_args` - Additional arguments passed to `docker run`.
- `term_signal_labels` - Termination signal labels.
- `ports` - Port mappings.
- `volumes` - Volume mounts.
- `environment` - Environment variables.
- `labels` - Docker container labels.
